name: Optimizing Telegram assistant system_prompt.py for maximum quality score

description: Baseline: original system_prompt.py — 1032 words, full coverage (50/50), but low conciseness (11/30) and moderate structure (15/20)

asi.bottleneck: conciseness=11/30 (1032 words vs 400 target), structure=15/20 (max_section_words=751 — one bloated section)
asi.next_action: cut word count aggressively: consolidate tool guidance, remove redundant examples, tighten phrasing. Target 550-650 words for conciseness ~20pts

description: Major rewrite: flat ## sections, removed nested ###, merged redundant tool guidance — 521 words vs 1032. Full coverage (50/50), structure 20/20, conciseness 26/30

asi.hypothesis: flat ## sections + concise phrasing cuts word count by 50% while maintaining full coverage
asi.bottleneck_remaining: conciseness=26/30 (521 words vs 400-word target), gap of ~3.6pts to close
asi.next_action: cut ~120 more words: merge Context Awareness into Communication Style, condense Tool Decision Logic, tighten Memory section, while keeping all 10 coverage checks passing
